docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINITFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF BAMIDELE OLOWA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORDOVAL RENEE IS PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 10-05-17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
FILED ANSWER TO SC-105 REQUEST ANSWER RECEIVED AFTER COURT RULING ON 10-16-17. ENVELOPE POSTMARKED 10-16-17.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/8/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
